# MuleSoft SAP Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (5.9) of SAP Connector documentation.
> See [SAP Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sap-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the SAP Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [SAP Connector 5.9](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sap-connector/latest/index.md)
- [Upgrading and Migrating to SAP Connector 5.x](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sap-connector/latest/sap-connector-5-upgrade.md)
- [Configuring an SAP Secure Network Communication Connection with Kerberos](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sap-connector/latest/sap-connector-config-snc-kerberos.md)
- [Configuring an SAP Secure Network Communication Connection with Certificate](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sap-connector/latest/sap-connector-config-snc.md)
- [SAP Connector 5.9 Additional Configuration](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sap-connector/latest/sap-connector-config-topics.md)
- [SAP Connector 5.9 Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sap-connector/latest/sap-connector-examples.md)
- [SAP Connector 5.9 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sap-connector/latest/sap-connector-reference.md)
- [SAP Connector 5.9 Studio Configuration](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sap-connector/latest/sap-connector-studio.md)
- [SAP Connector 5.9 Terminology](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sap-connector/latest/sap-connector-terminology.md)
- [Troubleshooting SAP Connector 5.9](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sap-connector/latest/sap-connector-troubleshooting.md)
- [SAP Connector 5.9 XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sap-connector/latest/sap-connector-xml-maven.md)
